excerpt: Update — Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.25 A new update is available on the Test channel . This version brings improvements, bug fixes, and enhanced device support based on community feedback. What’s New: v5.11.25: Fixed voltage divisor issue in driver #137 , improving accuracy of voltage readings., Rewrote dashboard fallback logic to enhance reliability during device state reporting., Implemented ultimate automation and core fixes to enhance overall app performance and stability., Updated various workflows for better management and efficiency, including improvements to GitHub state management and d Project Status: Version v5.11.25 Drivers 143 (Zigbee & WiFi) Fingerprints 5,353+ Flow Cards 1,803 Sync Live sync with Zigbee2MQTT & ZHA Links: Install test version: Universal Tuya Zigbee - Test Device Finder: Check if your device is supported Report a bug: GitHub Issues Tip: If a device was stuck or showing wrong values before this update, please remove it and re-pair for a clean start. Thank you all for your continuous feedback and diagnostic reports!
